description_long: This is a sleek, modern yacht with a long, narrow white hull and a streamlined profile. The vessel features multiple tall masts, suggesting it is a sailing yacht, and has a clean, uncluttered deck with minimal superstructure. The deck is equipped with railings and a few visible deck fittings, while the bow and stern are both sharply defined. The yacht is flanked by two rocky, landscaped islands with sparse vegetation, which appear to be part of a decorative or diorama setting. The overall appearance is elegant and functional, with a focus on open deck space and sailing capability.
description: A modern white sailing yacht with multiple tall masts, a streamlined hull, and minimal superstructure, set between two rocky landscaped islands.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the yacht, its masts, and the landscaped islands on either side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, narrow hull, and the alignment of the masts, with the islands visible in the background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the yacht's profile, deck railings, and the arrangement of the islands.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stern, the yacht's width, and the islands' placement relative to the vessel.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a long, slender, and streamlined shape, white in color, featuring a pointed bow and a flat stern. The hull has minimal visible markings and a clean, modern appearance.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level open deck with multiple tall masts, railings along the perimeter, and a few visible deck fittings. The deck is uncluttered, with no visible seating or cockpit enclosures, emphasizing open space.
attribute_cabin_structure: Low-profile cabin structure with minimal superstructure, no visible windows or doors from these views, and a streamlined exterior shape integrated into the deck.
